meta.title: ස්වයං-ඇණවුම් Kiosk ආපනශාලා සඳහා — Order Terminal සහ Self-Service | Gastro Master
meta.description: Gastro Master self-ordering kiosk: ගනුදෙනුකරුවන් terminal හෙන සෘජුව ඇණවුම් කර ගෙවනවා — queue නෑ, counter stress නෑ. බහු-භාෂා, 24/7, ස්වයංක්‍රීය upselling, POS system ට සම්පූර්ණ ලෙස integrate කළ. Fast food, bakeries, food courts, franchise සඳහා.

hero.headline: ස්වයං-ඇණවුම් Kiosk — Queue හි අවසානය
hero.subline: Terminal counter ගනී. ගනුදෙනුකරුවන් screen හේ සෘජුව select, configure සහ ගෙවනවා — multilingual, active upselling සහ waiting time නොමැතිව. Order real-time POS සහ kitchen ට ලැෙනවා. ඔබේ staff ගනී orders ගෙනීම වෙනුවට.

problem.title: Classic Counter ගැටළුව
points: Peak hours හිදී counter ඉදිරිපිට සෑම දෙයක්ම backup වෙනවා — ගනුදෙනුකරුවන් 8–12 minutes රැඳෙනවා, බොහෝ දෙනා ඉවත් යනවා.
Hospitality staff shortage: missing one till operator visibly reduces revenue per shift.
Manual order taking takes 90–120 seconds per guest — time that's directly missing during lunch or rush hour.
Upselling only works when staff have time and inclination — in practice larger sizes, sides and drinks are regularly missed.

solution.title: විසඳුම: ස්වයං-ඇණවුම් Kiosk
points: ගනුදෙනුකරුවන් touchscreen හෙන ස්වයංක්‍රීයව ඇණවුම් කරනවා — 60–90 seconds, clear images සහ options සමඟ.
Terminal හෙනම ගෙවීම: card, Apple Pay, Google Pay, cash optional. No additional step at the till.
Active upselling in order flow: large fries? drink? +20–30% basket, without staff.
Order goes instantly to POS and kitchen with order number for pick-up screen. No double entry.

features.headline: Self-Ordering සඳහා අවශ්‍ය සෑම දෙයක්ම
features.sub: Terminal ය order-payment channel බවට පත් කරන features හයක්.

items.title: Intuitive Touch ක්‍රියාකාරිත්වය
items.description: Large buttons, clear images, German and international visual language. Even elderly guests and children get through without help — no explanation needed.

items.title: ස්වයංක්‍රීය Upselling
items.description: Per item store recommendations — size upgrade, sides, drinks, desserts. Automatically shown in order flow, demonstrably increasing basket by 20–30%.

items.title: Multilingual Menu
items.description: German, English, French, Italian, Turkish, Spanish and more — guest chooses language at start. Perfect for tourism, train stations, airports, city locations.

items.title: සියලු ගෙවීමේ ක්‍රම
items.description: Debit card, Visa, Mastercard, Apple Pay, Google Pay — at terminal. Cash module upgradeable. ZVT-compliant.

items.title: 24/7 ක්‍රියාකාරිත්වය
items.description: For petrol stations, hotel lobbies or unmanned self-service: terminal takes orders round the clock, even when nobody is at counter.

items.title: Live Sync POS සහ Kitchen සමඟ
items.description: Every order goes instantly to cloud POS and kitchen monitor. Pick-up screen calls order number. No double entry, no lost orders.

useCases.headline: රෙස්ටුරන්ට් හිමිකරුවන් Kiosk භාවිත කරන ආකාරය
useCases.sub: Fast food සිට food court දක්වා සැබෑ scenarios.

items.title: Fast Food Chain Midday Rush
items.story: A burger concept in Berlin-Kreuzberg replaced two till positions with four self-ordering kiosks. Average wait fell from 8 to under 4 minutes — lunchtime revenue rose 28% without extra staff.

items.title: Bakery with Takeaway
items.story: A bakery at Hamburg Central Station installed two kiosks. Quick takeaway customers order at terminal, staff focuses on consultation — +35% orders per hour.

items.title: Food Court with Multiple Concepts
items.story: An operator in a Munich shopping centre placed a kiosk in front of every stand. Guests order ahead, number appears on pick-up screen — counter became pure handover station, labour reduced by 1.5 FTE per shift.

stats.label: higher average basket through active upselling

testimonial.quote: We regularly had 15 people queuing at lunch — many left. Since the four kiosks we handle the same rush in half the time, and the basket rose by €4.80 because the terminal suggests drinks and dessert to everyone. For my counter crew, the biggest stress-killer of recent years.
testimonial.author: Tarek B.

pricing.headline: මිල ගණන් සහ ලබා ගැනීමේ හැකියාව
pricing.note: Fast food, bakeries, food courts සහ franchise සඳහා POS add-on. Form factor, terminal ගණන, card reader integration සහ optional cash module අනුව. නොමිලේ consultation හිදී setup ස්ථාපිත — hardware, installation, configuration සහ cloud POS connection ඇතුළු.

internalLinks.headline: මෙවා සමඟ හොඳින් ක්‍රියා කරනවා
internalLinks.intro: Self-ordering kiosk Gastro Master ecosystem හි කොටසක් ලෙස terminal order සිට guest handover දක්වා.

items.title: POS පද්ධතිය
items.description: Heart of system. Every kiosk order goes automatically to cloud POS, kitchen monitor, pick-up screen — with order number, items and special requests.

items.title: රෙස්ටුරන්ට් විසඳුම
items.description: Complete package of POS, self-ordering, display system and kitchen monitor — for fast food and high on-site throughput businesses.

faq.headline: ස්වයං-ඇණවුම් Kiosk ගැන නිතර අසන ප්‍රශ්න
faq.sub: Fast food, bakeries, food courts සහ franchise නිතර අසන ප්‍රශ්නවලට පිළිතුරු.

items.a: Depends on form factor, terminal count and modules. After free consultation we provide specific quote. Most fast food and bakeries pay back in 6–12 months.
High order volume businesses with short dwell times: fast food, burger/pizza chains, bakeries, cafes, food courts, franchises. From 80–100 orders per day or regular peak queuing.
One kiosk replaces roughly one till operator at peak. 60–80 seat restaurant: 2–3 terminals. Bakery with lunch: 1–2. Food court stand: 1 per concept.
Counter (stand for counter, compact), freestanding (floor column, ideal entrance or centre island), wall-mounted (space-saving, bakeries). All with card reader, cash module optional.
Debit, Visa, Mastercard, Amex, Apple Pay, Google Pay as standard. Cash module with change dispensing optional. ZVT standard, no vendor lock-in.
Per item store recommendations in backoffice — larger fries, drink, dessert. Kiosk shows them automatically. Industry average increases basket 20–30% without staff selling.
German, English, French, Italian, Spanish, Turkish as standard. Additional languages on request. Guest selects at start with one tap.
If you use Gastro Master POS, kiosk is immediately ready. Orders land in cloud POS, kitchen monitor and pick-up screen. No separate setup needed.
Yes. Large buttons, clear product images, simple language. Screen height adjustable (wheelchair mode). Voice output module on request.
Brief internet outage: terminal continues offline, orders sync when connection returns. Power outage: display restarts automatically, reloads last state from cloud.
